privileged_info_summary: The task.json file for layer_offset@1 contains NO metadata field. Verified that: (1) The task uses real, downloadable Unsplash images as primary source data (https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1557804506-669a67965ba0 and https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618005182384-a83a8bd57fbe), with synthetic checkerboard pattern fallback if downloads fail. (2) GIMP's Layer → Transform → Offset feature with wrap-around mode is a genuine, documented capability across GIMP 2.4-3.0. (3) The wrap-around option correctly fills empty space with content shifted out from opposite edges, preserving all pixel content. (4) The verifier's cross-correlation-based offset detection and modulo arithmetic wrap-around validation methods are mathematically sound. (5) Verification thresholds (≥10% displacement, ≥90% pixel match) are reasonable and properly documented.
